query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A cyclist in a black and yellow racing uniform and silver helmet leans forward on a road bicycle traveling down a multi-lane street. Palm trees and commercial buildings with awnings line the left sidewalk, where several spectators sit on a low brick wall and others stand nearby. A person holding a camera stands on the right sidewalk. Orange traffic cones mark the road ahead, and a tall white building is visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A cyclist in a black and yellow racing uniform and silver helmet is rendered with heavy motion blur while leaning forward on a road bicycle traveling down a multi-lane street. The intentional blur conveys a sense of rapid speed. Palm trees and commercial buildings with awnings line the left sidewalk, where several spectators sit on a low brick wall and others stand nearby. A person holding a camera stands on the right sidewalk. Orange traffic cones mark the road ahead, and a tall white building is visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.
